TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marshall_Allman, title = Marshall_Allman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marshall_Allman} }

S.FORM: Marshall Allman kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 4, Marshall Allman, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Marshall Allman kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 4, Marshall Allman, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: mars~ɕħall allman kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, mars~ɕħall allman, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
